member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Auth.ICurrentLanguageProvider
member.summary: Provides the current selected spoken-language code for outgoing SDK HTTP requests.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Auth.ITokenProvider
member.summary: Token provider interface. SDK callers implement this to supply authentication tokens. SDK calls GetAccessTokenAsync before every HTTP/WebSocket request. OnTokenExpiredAsync is called when SDK receives a 401 response.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Auth.ITokenProvider.GetAccessTokenAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get the current valid access token. Return format: the raw token string (no "Bearer" prefix needed — SDK adds it).

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Auth.ITokenProvider.OnTokenExpiredAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Called when SDK receives a 401 Unauthorized response. The implementer should refresh the token or trigger re-login. Return true if token was successfully refreshed, false otherwise.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Auth.TokenContext
member.summary: Token context passed between SDK layers.

member.name: P:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Auth.TokenContext.AuthHeader
member.summary: Additional auth header value (used for SOE HMAC auth).

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.ApiResponse`1
member.summary: Unified API response wrapper matching AiTalk API format.

member.name: P:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.ApiResponse`1.Code
member.summary: Numeric status code returned by the API (server-defined).

member.name: P:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.ApiResponse`1.Value
member.summary: Payload value returned by the API. The concrete type is T.

member.name: P:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.ApiResponse`1.Success
member.summary: Indicates whether the request was successful.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.SoeApiResponse`1
member.summary: API response wrapper matching SOE API format.

member.name: P:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.SoeApiResponse`1.Code
member.summary: Numeric status code returned by SOE API.

member.name: P:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.SoeApiResponse`1.Info
member.summary: Informational message or explanation from SOE API.

member.name: P:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.SoeApiResponse`1.Data
member.summary: Response payload (data) returned by the SOE API.

member.name: P:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.SoeApiResponse`1.Success
member.summary: Whether the SOE API reports success for the request.

member.name: P:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.Page`1.TotalCount
member.summary: Total number of items available across all pages.

member.name: P:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.Page`1.Data
member.summary: Page data payload. The concrete shape is T (commonly a list).

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.SpeakLanguage
member.summary: Spoken-language option returned by AiTalk scene APIs.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.TaskResult
member.summary: Task result summary (practice session list item). Clean DTO — no WPF/UI properties.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.TaskRecord
member.summary: Individual record within a conversation task. Clean DTO — no INotifyPropertyChanged, no Visibility, no Image paths.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.UserSingleReviewResult
member.summary: User's single review/evaluation result. Field names match server response (camelCase, PropertyNameCaseInsensitive handles mapping).

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.AcquireTokenRequest
member.summary: Request to acquire an evaluation token from SOE service.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.SubmitEvaluationRequest
member.summary: Request to submit audio for speech evaluation.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.EvaluationRequestJson
member.summary: The evaluation request JSON embedded in SubmitEvaluationRequest.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.SiRecord
member.summary: Simultaneous translation record. Clean DTO — no INotifyPropertyChanged, no UI properties.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.SiRecordDetail
member.summary: Single entry in a simultaneous translation session.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.VoiceToneDigitalPerson
member.summary: Digital person configuration attached to a voice tone.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.RecommendSpeakResult
member.summary: Recommended speaking prompt for AI conversation.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.UploadResult
member.summary: Result of uploading a file to cloud storage.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.SaveRecordEndRequest
member.summary: Save record end request (for simultaneous translation).

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.AudioFileInfo
member.summary: Audio format/quality information for a recording.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.IShiliuOralClient
member.summary: Unified facade for the Shiliu Oral English SDK. Provides access to all core services through a single entry point.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.IAiTalkService
member.summary: AI conversation service for scene-based dialogue practice. Also owns translation APIs per the original AiTalkClient design.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.IAiTalkService.GetTwoLevelScenesAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get sub-scenes for a parent scene.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.IAiTalkService.GetTaskRecordListAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get conversation records for a task.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.IAiTalkService.StartTaskAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Start a new conversation task for a scene.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.IAiTalkService.GetRecommendSpeakAsync(System.Int32,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get recommended speaking prompts for a task.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.IAiTalkService.GetVoiceTonesListByLangAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get available voice tone list by selected language.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.IAiTalkService.GetUploadTokenAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get upload token for cloud storage.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.IAiTalkService.GetTaskDetailAsync(System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get task detail and evaluation summary.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.IAiTalkService.GetWordPhraseListAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get word/phrase practice list for a scene.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.ISpeechEvaluationService.GetTimestampAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get server timestamp for auth signature.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.ISpeechEvaluationService.SubmitEvaluationAsync(Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Models.SubmitEvaluationRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Submit audio for real-time evaluation. Returns result directly if server responds synchronously.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.ISpeechEvaluationService.QueryEvaluationResultAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Query evaluation results by correct ID.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.ISpeechEvaluationService.GenerateAuthHeaderAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generate HMAC auth header for SOE API.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.ISpeechRecognizer
member.summary: Speech recognition service (ASR — Automatic Speech Recognition). Supports both one-shot and continuous streaming recognition.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.ISpeechRecognizer.ConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connect to the speech recognition service.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.ISpeechRecognizer.SendStartMessageAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send the START message to begin recognition.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.ISpeechRecognizer.EnqueueAudioData(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Enqueue audio data for streaming recognition.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.ISpeechRecognizer.SendAudioStreamAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Start the audio streaming send loop.

member.name: E:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.ISpeechRecognizer.OnTextMessage
member.summary: Fired when a text recognition result is received.

member.name: E:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.ISpeechRecognizer.OnBinaryMessage
member.summary: Fired when binary audio data is received.

member.name: E:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.ISpeechRecognizer.OnEndMessage
member.summary: Fired when the recognition session ends.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.ITranslationService
member.summary: Translation service: text translation + simultaneous (real-time) translation.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.ITranslationService.CreateSiRecordAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a new simultaneous translation session.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.ITranslationService.SaveSiRecordAsync(System.Int64,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Save an entry in a simultaneous translation session.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.ITranslationService.SaveRecordEndAsync(System.Int64,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: End a simultaneous translation session and save audio.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.IAudioCaptureService
member.summary: Audio capture service for microphone recording. SDK callers can either use this service or provide their own audio stream.

member.name: P:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.IAudioCaptureService.IsCapturing
member.summary: Whether audio capture is currently active.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.IAudioCaptureService.Start(System.String)
member.summary: Start audio capture and save to file.

member.name: E:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.IAudioCaptureService.AudioDataAvailable
member.summary: Fired when new audio data is available.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.IAudioPlayerService
member.summary: Audio playback service for playing audio files.

member.name: E:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Services.IAudioPlayerService.PlaybackStopped
member.summary: Fired when playback stops (naturally or via Stop).

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Events.AudioFrameEventArgs
member.summary: Event arguments for audio frame data.

member.name: P:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Events.AudioFrameEventArgs.BytesRecorded
member.summary: Number of bytes recorded in this frame.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Events.AsrPartialEventArgs
member.summary: Partial (interim) ASR result — recognition is still in progress.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Events.AsrFinalEventArgs
member.summary: Final ASR result — recognition is complete for this utterance.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Enums.AudioFormat
member.summary: Supported audio formats for recording and processing.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.Abstractions.Exceptions.ShiliuOralException
member.summary: Unified exception type for all Shiliu Oral SDK errors. Callers can catch this single type and use Category for dispatch.
